chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1981 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 17937/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For Katcha Peshi. 20.12.2016. Mr. Fakhur Din Dahraj, Advocate for petitioner alongwith Petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith Inspector Mansoor Ahmed Memon, SHO P.S Nabisar, District Umerkot. -.-.-. Today detainee Sht. Zano has been produced by the area SHO Inspector Mansoor Ahmed Memon. According to statement of detainee, she took lift from some unknown person and produced herself in Police Station Umerkot City, whereafter she was handed over to concerned Police Station Nabisar. The SHO states that the detainee herself alongwith her minor child came to the Police Station. However, when queried, the said lady detainee stated that before she was in the custody of private respondents. Today, Mr. Abdul Jabbar Belai, Advocate, has filed vakalatnama alongwith a detailed counter affidavit on behalf of private respondents, wherein the allegations have been denied. According to learned Counsel for private respondents, Sht. Zano and her family members were working as haries at the agricultural lands of private respondents and private respondents have not detained them illegally. Though the purpose of this petition has been served, as the detainee Sht. Zano daughter of Karamchhi has been produced in Court and she wanted to go alongwith her family members, who are also present today, therefore, while setting her at liberty, it is necessary that her statement be recorded by the concerned SHO today. This petition is disposed of with the above observation and with the directions that the SHO will record her statement and produce a copy whereof before the Court today and will proceed in the matter in the light of the statement of Sht.

Zano daughter of Karamchhi has been produced in Court and she wanted to go alongwith her family members, who are also present today, therefore, while setting her at liberty, it is necessary that her statement be recorded by the concerned SHO today. This petition is disposed of with the above observation and with the directions that the SHO will record her statement and produce a copy whereof before the Court today and will proceed in the matter in the light of the statement of Sht. Zano, strictly in accordance with law. Copy of this order be sent to A.A.G, for strict compliance. JUDGE Ali Haider
